name: Abdullah Saeed Khodari
title: Backend Engineer
summary: Backend Engineer with extensive experience designing scalable microservices and RESTful APIs using Node.js, Express, NestJS, and TypeScript. Proficient in database optimization with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB. Adept at integrating complex third-party services (Stripe, Fawry, OpenAI) and deploying containerized applications using Docker and AWS.

experience.brief: Developed backend architecture for a voice AI platform, integrating Soniox STT, Dograh conversational workflows, and Anthropic Batch APIs for automated call summarization.
Architecting robust microservices, optimizing relational databases, and integrating complex third-party APIs (Stripe, OpenAI) for high-traffic platforms.
Engineered the core Node.js/MongoDB backend infrastructure, managing game state data, AWS S3 asset delivery, and payment gateway integrations.

projects.name: Voice AI Agent Platform | Olimi AI
bullets: Integrated advanced Text-to-Speech (TTS) and Speech-to-Text (STT) servers, implementing the Soniox STT API to handle low-latency transcription for voice agents.
Engineered an automated data pipeline using the Anthropic Batch API to process and generate accurate summaries from large volumes of call transcriptions.
Configured and deployed Dograh, an open-source voice AI conversation builder, to manage telephony integrations and orchestrate complex AI caller workflows.
Developed and maintained core backend services, implementing robust CRUD operations for user configuration, call routing, and system data management.

projects.name: Loyalla - Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Architected a scalable 4-tier multi-tenant SaaS architecture (Agencies > Tenants > Branches > Consumers) using Node.js, Express, and Drizzle ORM.
Engineered a resilient billing engine integrating Stripe and Fawry for automated subscription mirroring, multi-currency billing, localized tax compliance (VAT), and automated PDF/QR invoicing.
Orchestrated asynchronous marketing campaigns and system maintenance using a distributed pg-boss task system, and implemented security via Supabase Vault and a GDPR data portability engine.
Built an administrative dashboard using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with full internationalization (LTR/RTL) and advanced analytics via Chart.js and React-Leaflet.
Designed an interactive developer portal featuring automated API documentation and environment-aware code samples for third-party POS integrations.

projects.name: Enterprise ERP & POS Platform | OrderKing Egypt
bullets: Designed and optimized a cross-country B2B ERP and POS platform powered by Node.js, Express, and MySQL, featuring a proprietary Product Stock Location (PSL) logistics engine using CRON jobs and WebSockets.

Automated physical warehouse workflows with generated scannable asset labels, and developed the secure infrastructure powering 'QuickPlate' self-ordering tablets including SaaS subscriptions and heartbeat monitoring.
Engineered multi-channel CRM ticketing with real-time chat and RMA handling, and pushed emergency support tickets to field agents via direct APNs and Firebase Admin FCM.
Implemented a comprehensive financial suite tracking fiscal periods and multi-currency mappings, alongside token-authenticated digital asset viewing and e-signature capabilities.
Configured robust authentication layers with strictly protected routing to separate user journeys for internal admin agents and external B2B clients.

projects.name: WingoLand - Game-Based Learning Platform | WingoLand
bullets: Engineered the backend architecture using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to manage dynamic game data and user state.
Implemented complex monetization flows including Apple In-App Purchases, Tap payments gateway, and Tabby split payments.
Managed static asset delivery and optimization via AWS S3 to ensure fast load times across global regions.

projects.name: Kafka Event Handler – Microservice
bullets: Built a fault-tolerant event streaming service using Apache Kafka and Node.js.
Implemented producer/consumer patterns to decouple services and ensure data consistency.
Containerized the entire stack using Docker for consistent local and production environments.

projects.name: QR Auth System
bullets: Developed a secure authentication backend using JWT and bcrypt.
Implemented real-time socket connections for instant QR code validation.
Designed a schema-driven API using Zod for strict input validation.

projects.name: EduBase API
bullets: Engineered a course management API with role-based access control (RBAC).
Integrated Paymob payment gateway and automated email receipts using Nodemailer.

education.details: Intensive hands-on training focusing on building full-stack applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Angular, and Node.js.

education.degree: Bachelor's in Computer and Systems Engineering
education.details: Grade: Very good. Graduation project: Backend for Game-based learning platform.
